blockedMarkets.reason: Official Marion County ArcGIS EPL_PermitReport layer is machine-readable and exposes permit number, dates, type/status, parcel, and site address, but it does not expose contractor/builder/applicant/contact fields. Marionfl.org Building Safety pages returned HTTP 403 from this environment, and token-gated internal permit map services are not safe to automate. Unable to produce 20+ unique permit-active builders without fabricating builder identities.
blockedMarkets.nextHumanAction: Ask Marion County Building Safety/Growth Services for a public contractor-bearing permit export/API, report endpoint, or portal access path; otherwise pick another official FL inland county source with contractor fields.
